meta.note: Faithful, extractive summaries; every item links to its original source.

items.headline: Hack suggests AI music generator Suno scraped YouTube for training data
items.summary: The hacker used an employee's credentials to access source code, which revealed how Suno scraped decades of audio.

items.headline: Whatnot acquires Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations
items.summary: Livestream shopping platform Whatnot has acquired AI startup Shaped, a machine learning company focused on real-time recommendations and search. The deal will bolster Whatnot’s personalization and discovery features as it expands into new…

items.headline: Microsoft patches record number of security vulnerabilities, citing its use of AI
items.summary: Microsoft's monthly release of security fixes, dubbed Patch Tuesday, resolved a record 570 security vulnerabilities across the company's product line, thanks to discoveries with AI.

items.headline: OpenAI's first branded hardware is... a light-up keyboard?
items.summary: The Codex Micro is designed to monitor multiple agentic threads at a glance.

items.headline: OpenAI finally launches hardware… for Codex
items.summary: OpenAI is finally releasing some hardware. No, it isn't the mysterious AI-powered device the company is developing with former Apple designer Jony Ive, a project already tangled up in a messy lawsuit. Instead, it's a product designed to be…

items.headline: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba’s Qwen AI
items.summary: Apple Intelligence is headed to China after regulators approved Apple’s AI services through a partnership with Alibaba. The long-rumored deal will bring Alibaba’s Qwen AI models to Apple’s operating systems, marking a major expansion of…

items.headline: Anthropic, Blackstone bet the next trillion-dollar AI business is implementation, not just models
items.summary: Anthropic-backed Ode launches as AI labs bet that embedding forward-deployed engineers inside enterprises is the key to accelerating enterprise AI adoption.

items.headline: Reelful’s AI turns your camera roll into short-form videos for social media
items.summary: The app is designed for people who want to create social content, but find traditional video editing tools too complex or time-consuming.

items.headline: Rime picks up $24M Series A to help enterprises field customer calls
items.summary: Rime is handling over 100 million calls each month across multiple companies.

items.headline: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
items.summary: OpenAI outlines a “reverse federalism” approach to AI governance, where state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI.

items.headline: Indian AI coding startup Emergent becomes a unicorn with $130M Series C
items.summary: The startup has reached a $120 million annualized revenue run rate and more than 200,000 paying customers.

items.headline: Vint Cerf is working on a plan to unleash AI agents on the open internet
items.summary: The guy behind TCP/IP is working on a standard for identifying AI agents in the wild.

items.headline: GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
items.summary: Explore GPT-Red, OpenAI’s automated red teaming system that uses self-play to improve AI safety, alignment, and prompt injection robustness.
